notes: Excellent README. Comprehensive and well-structured with badges (npm, license, Node.js, Discord), clear tagline, navigation link bar, demo GIF, dual Quick Start paths (AI agent skills + manual CLI), What You Can Build use cases, Frame.md design system feature, How It Works with full HTML code example, HyperFrames Stack table, Catalog with CLI install commands, feature differentiators (Why HyperFrames?), detailed Remotion comparison table, full Documentation link list, Packages table, Community section, Development Note with Git LFS instructions, and License. Has docs/ directory with comprehensive documentation (quickstart.mdx, introduction.mdx, contributing.mdx, examples.mdx, guides/, reference/). Has an examples/ directory with deployment examples (aws-lambda, gcp-cloud-run, k8s-jobs). No separate demo/ directory. Links to external showcase, playground, and full documentation site.
